title: Undertow
subtitle: Some secrets don't stay buried. Some people don't stay alive.
description: Six friends. One beach house on the Carolina coast. A weekend that was supposed to feel like old times. By Saturday morning, one of them is dead — door locked from the inside, window facing a twenty-foot drop to the beach, and an argument the group heard through the door at nine PM that turns out to be something far more sinister than a bad phone call. Julian Cross wasn't supposed to be involved. He was on vacation. But Julian Cross has never been able to walk past something that doesn't add up.
shortDescription: A locked-room murder at a Carolina beach house. A detective on vacation who can't turn his mind off. And a killer who almost got away with it.

mainCharacters.name: Julian Cross
mainCharacters.description: Independent forensic consultant. Photographic memory, razor-sharp deductive reasoning, and a fundamental inability to let something wrong go unexplained. On forced vacation when the case finds him.

mainCharacters.name: Nadia Cole
mainCharacters.description: Composed, precise, devastatingly controlled. She has been patient for eight years. This weekend, her patience runs out.

mainCharacters.name: Marcus Webb
mainCharacters.description: The warmest person in any room. The one who held the group together. He had no idea what he was carrying.

mainCharacters.name: Dean Hartley
mainCharacters.role: Supporting — The One Who Never Knew
mainCharacters.description: Genuinely good, quietly oblivious. He never got the letter. He has no idea what was done in his name.

author: StoryWeaver

chapters.title: Arrival
chapters.mood: Someone has been waiting a very long time. The house is beautiful. The weekend is supposed to be perfect.
